Align a residual path (values on the smoother's clipped grid) to query dates

Source: R/target_model.R
dot-residual_on_qdates.Rd

Returns NA for query dates outside the analyte's clipped grab span – those rows are dropped by .resolve_target_impact() (per-analyte clipping).

Usage

.residual_on_qdates(grid_dates, path, qdates)

Developed by Robin Shannon.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
